headline: Institutional Capital For Sustainable Bitcoin Mining
body: Sustainable BTC bridges Bitcoin mining operations and institutional capital. We connect renewable-powered mining infrastructure with compliant investors through a trust layer enabling transparent energy verification, institutional-grade governance, and proven environmental impact at scale.

ecosystemNodes.label: Mining Operators
ecosystemNodes.description: Leading Bitcoin mining operations powered by renewable energy

ecosystemNodes.label: Sustainable BTC
ecosystemNodes.description: Trust layer enabling transparent energy verification and attestation

ecosystemNodes.label: Institutional Capital
